card.title: Elon Musk depõe em ação contra a OpenAI - Paulo Figueiredo
card.description: Para o empresário, empresa traiu sua missão original de desenvolver IA sem fins lucrativos; companhia disse que beneficia a humanidade Nesta 3ª feira, Elon Musk deve depor em julgamento contra a OpenAI. O empresário afirma que a criadora do ChatGPT abandonou sua missão original de desenvolver IA (inteligência artificial) sem fins lucrativos. Além de Musk, irão depor Sam Altman, CEO da OpenAI, Satya Nadella, CEO da Microsoft, e a esposa do dono do X e ex-membro do conselho da OpenAI, Shivon Zilis. Musk alega que a transformação da empresa em uma corporação de utilidade pública, supervisionada por uma fundação sem fins lucrativos, traiu a missão original da organização —que ele ajudou a fundar e financiar. Elon Musk deixou a OpenAI em 2018 Em 2015, Musk doou US$ 44 milhões para o desenvolvimento da OpenAI, com a condição de que a empresa mantivesse caráter não lucrativo. O empresário deixou a companhia em 2018. Em comunicado publicado em seu site oficial, a OpenAI afirma que Musk “passou anos assediando a OpenAI com processos infundados e ataques públicos” por inveja do sucesso da empresa que continua “governada por uma organização sem fins lucrativos⁠ dedicada à mesma missão que beneficie toda a humanidade”. Na ação, Musk pede uma indenização de US$ 150 bilhões, que, segundo ele, deveria ser destinada a um braço beneficente da OpenAI. Ele também solicita que a Justiça determine o retorno da empresa à estrutura sem fins lucrativos, além da destituição de Altman e Greg Brockman de seus cargos. Crédito Poder360

看过 挽救计划 🌕🌕🌕🌕🌗
好看捏，石好人坏！推荐讨厌整体人类的所有人类观看！
我之前对外星人电影最大的吐槽就是太人类中心，凭啥觉得像地球生物的才叫生物，碳基生物才是生物，自己的感官太局限就不承认其他生物是生物！
但人类的作品其实无法避免用人类熟悉的方式呈现，但还是符合我那个理论，创作者是带着对外星人的尊重还是从人类中心的傲慢无知出发很显而易见。

card.title: Trial begins for Indonesian service members in acid attack on activist
card.description: An Indonesian military court has opened the trial of four service members accused of carrying out an acid attack on a prominent human rights activist. The case has reignited concerns about military impunity. Three Indonesian navy marines and one air force officer are charged with serious assault in the attack on a human rights lawyer and senior activist. Prosecutors allege the four men acted together but describe the motive as personal reasons, a conclusion that has drawn sharp criticism from human rights groups. The four service members were all assigned to military intelligence.

card.title: Trump's photo will appear on commemorative passports for US 250th
card.description: The State Department says it's preparing a limited release of commemorative U.S. passports celebrating America’s 250th birthday and featuring a picture of President Donald Trump. He would be the first living president to be featured in the travel document. The concept for the special passport, including a rendering of Trump’s visage, had been under consideration for months before finally being approved late Monday and announced Tuesday. The commemorative passport will be the default document for people applying in person at the Washington, D.C., passport office. But those who want a standard passport will be able to get one by applying online or outside Washington.

card.title: Robot dogs with Elon Musk heads roam Berlin museum in Beeple's new exhibit
card.description: Robot dogs with hyper-realistic silicone heads modeled after famous figures like Elon Musk and Mark Zuckerberg are roaming a Berlin museum. They occasionally “poo” printed images of their surroundings, captured with integrated cameras. This interactive installation by American artist Beeple is at Berlin's Neue Nationalgalerie. Each image reflects the personality of the dog’s human figure, like Picasso's Cubist style. The exhibition comments on how algorithms shape our perceptions. Beeple, a prominent digital artist, is known for his “everyday” movement in 3D graphics. His work has sold for millions, marking significant milestones in digital art.
card.image_description: Artist Beeple, Mike Winkelmann, poses inside his installation titled Regular Animals, with robots in the likeness of Kim Jong Un, left, Elon Musk, second left, Jeff Bezos, center, and Mark Zuckerberg, right, at the Neue Nationalgalerie museum in Berlin, Germany, Tuesday, April 28, 2026. (AP Photo/Markus Schreiber)

content:
Good Morning! Beige be with you :bb:

Today is a study day. I may take the laptop downstairs and study on my sofa in the front room where the sun comes in through the window. I won't have my monitor down there, but I think the change of scenery is probably a good thing for my ADHD brain. Maybe I can trick it into thinking that is enough novelty to buckle down and get on with the study.

I also need to make a doctors appointment, which means filling out a form online. I hate this, but this is what I must do.

If I am ok enough, I will take the dog for a walk. I could do with doing a very short meditation also. This is something I need to get back into the habit of doing, as I definitely cope better with life if I meditate regularly.

How is your day looking?

#GoodMorning #BeigeBlessings #Today #ADHD
